title: Wooden Wine Box Crate - 12 Bottle French, Reclaimed - Storage, Planter, Hamper, Wedding, Vintage, Shabby Chic, Retro. (3)
description: Product description Genuine French 12 bottle wine boxes. Our boxes are sourced direct from France, and can be used for storage, planters, display and furniture. All boxes are for French wines, so no other European or new world wines. Your boxes would be chosen at random from our stock and are in good used and unused condition, so may show signs of wear and use adding to their charm. None are from bonded warehouses with stickers to remove. Approximate dimensions: Length 50cm, Width 33cm, Height 18cm (some vineyards do have slightly different dimensions, so please contact us if this is critical to you). Legal Disclaimer The boxes are supplied empty, so do not include anything inside them shown in images. All Dimensions are approximate.
